mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId, TRIP_NM AS tripNm, TRIP_LAT AS tripLat, TRIP_LOT AS tripLot, TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr FROM trip WHERE TRIP_LAT IS NOT NULL AND TRIP_LOT IS NOT NULL AND TRIP_LAT != 0 AND TRIP_LOT != 0

SELECT HP_NO AS hpNo, HP_NM AS hpNm, HP_LAT AS hpLat, HP_LOT AS hpLot, HP_ADDR AS hpAddr, HP_TELNO1 AS hpTelno1 FROM hospital WHERE HP_LAT IS NOT NULL AND HP_LOT IS NOT NULL AND HP_LAT != 0 AND HP_LOT != 0
SELECT DS_NO AS dsNo, DS_NM AS dsNm, DS_LAT AS dsLat, DS_LOT AS dsLot, DS_ADDR AS dsAddr, DS_TELNO AS dsTelno FROM drug WHERE DS_LAT IS NOT NULL AND DS_LOT IS NOT NULL AND DS_LAT != 0 AND DS_LOT != 0
